surgery_guide_01: the skin must not be cut
surgery_guide_03: the skin must not be open
surgery_guide_04: the blood vessels must be unclamped
surgery_guide_05: the blood vessels must not be unclamped
surgery_guide_06: the blood vessels must be clamped
surgery_guide_07: the blood vessels must not be clamped
surgery_guide_09: the organs must not be cut
surgery_guide_11: the bone must not be drilled
surgery_guide_13: the bone must not be sawed
surgery_guide_17: the prosthetic must not be unsecured
surgery_guide_18: the chest cavity must be opened wide
surgery_guide_19: the chest cavity must not be opened wide
surgery_guide_complex_anatomy: The patient must not have complex anatomy
surgery_req_54f6a013: have an implant case below or inhand to store removed implants
surgery_req_53f054e6: if the limb has bones, they must be intact
surgery_req_a2f597b5: the debris has been cleared from the cranial fissure
surgery_req_1164b871: the limb must have a compound fracture
surgery_req_669309b6: the limb must have a hairline fracture
surgery_req_779c016d: the limb must have a second degree or worse burn
surgery_req_92c1a8df: the limb must have an operated puncture wound
surgery_req_31673ec0: the limb must have an unoperated puncture wound
surgery_req_7d19d681: the limb must have blood vessels
surgery_req_4e1e873a: the limb's compound fracture has been reset
surgery_req_6157b67f: the patient must be in a revivable state
surgery_req_cedeb28b: the patient must have brute or burn damage
surgery_req_ec24aaec: the patient must not be husked
